summary: ZIP Import, File Storage, and Intervention History Import features tested. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All 8 import tabs visible including 'Historique Interventions', Bâtiments import accepts ZIP files, Photos button visible in building modal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ZIP import, file storage, and intervention history import features fully tested. All backend endpoints working. Frontend shows 8 import tabs including new 'Historique Interventions' tab. Building modal has 'Photos' button for viewing imported photos.

2_backend_zip_execute.details: Requires valid session_id, returns 404 for invalid session

4_backend_file_download.details: Requires auth token in query param, returns 401 without auth

6_backend_intervention_preview.details: Accepts CSV, XML, ZIP files, returns session_id, total, new_count, duplicate_count

8_frontend_8_import_tabs.details: ParametresImports shows 8 tabs: Bâtiments, Hydrants, EPI, Matériel & Équipements, Personnel, Rapports & Budgets, Disponibilités, Historique Interventions

9_frontend_batiments_accepts_zip.details: Bâtiments tab shows 'Choisir un fichier CSV, XML ou ZIP' and description mentions ZIP support

10_frontend_interventions_tab.details: Historique Interventions tab shows file upload UI for CSV/XML/ZIP

11_frontend_photos_button.details: Building modal has '📸 Photos' button in action bar
